title: kedrostis zeyheri var. angustiloba
intro: Kedrostis zeyheri var. angustiloba, also known as the Cape sour cucumber or African cucumber, is a plant species in the Cucurbitaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Kedrostis zeyheri var. angustiloba is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are applied topically or consumed as remedies.
